description.ko: 유기적 생명체와 디지털 구조가 만나는 숨막히는 시각화로, 고요한 사이버네틱 생태계 속에서 복잡한 회로와 통합된 빛나는 식물들을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A breathtaking visualization where organic life meets digital architecture, featuring luminous flora integrated with complex circuitry in a serene cybernetic ecosystem.

prompt: Hyper-realistic digital nature, a forest of bioluminescent translucent flowers with glowing circuit board patterns on petals, floating data particles, neon fiber-optic roots extending into a shimmering digital lake, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere, cyber-organic fusion, vibrant teal and magenta accents.
